payload.label: outlet
payload.long_description: White plastic rectangular duplex outlet faceplate shown vertically in the crop; image is blurry and low-resolution with a faint greenish color cast, and two socket openings are only faintly visible — appears photographed from close range (approx. 0.8 m).
